# Lakewood Ranch Concrete

> East Manatee&rsquo;s concrete &amp; paver crew — driveways, patios, pool decks, and hardscape installed to last in the Florida sun, from Lakewood Ranch to the coast.
> Fully insured concrete &amp; paver contractor — a Service-Area Business based in east
> Bradenton, Florida 34212 (bordering Lakewood Ranch), serving Lakewood Ranch,
> Manatee, Sarasota, Charlotte &amp; south Hillsborough counties within a ~60-mile radius.

## Key Facts

- Business name: Lakewood Ranch Concrete (Lakewood Ranch Concrete LLC)
- Type: Concrete &amp; paver / hardscape contractor (Service-Area Business — no walk-in storefront)
- Service area: east Bradenton, FL 34212 hub, ~60-mile radius across Manatee County,
  Sarasota County, Charlotte County, and south Hillsborough County
- Insured: Fully Insured
- Estimates: Free estimate within 24 hours, often same-day.
- Warranty: Written workmanship warranty on every pour and every paver install.
- Quality standard: Lakewood Ranch Concrete 42-Point Install Standard (42 verification points on every job)
- Cities served: Lakewood Ranch, Bradenton, Parrish, Palmetto, Ellenton, Sarasota,
  Venice, North Port, Port Charlotte, Punta Gorda, Riverview, and Sun City Center, Florida

## Services

- [Concrete Driveways](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/concrete-driveways/): Poured-in-place driveways engineered for Gulf Coast heat and shifting soil &mdash; properly jointed, fiber-reinforced, and finished to carry Florida vehicles without the spider-cracking you see two doors down.
- [Concrete Patios](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/concrete-patios/): Outdoor living slabs &mdash; broom-finish, stamped, or stained &mdash; built to drain away from the house, beat the Gulf Coast sun, and turn a bare backyard into the room you actually use ten months a year.
- [Concrete Pool Decks](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/concrete-pool-decks/): Slip-resistant, cool-to-the-touch pool decks &mdash; textured stamped, cool-deck, and paver-look finishes built to shed water, beat barefoot heat, and stand up to chlorine and salt around Lakewood Ranch pools.
- [Stamped &amp; Decorative Concrete](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/stamped-concrete/): Stamped patios, pool decks, driveways, and walkways that read as travertine, slate, brick, or wood plank &mdash; poured, textured, and sealed to hold their color under the Gulf Coast sun.
- [Concrete Slabs &amp; Pads](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/concrete-slabs/): Shed pads, AC and generator pads, RV and boat pads, parking aprons, sidewalks, and walkways &mdash; poured flat, pitched to drain, and built for the load they&rsquo;ll actually carry.
- [Concrete Resurfacing &amp; Repair](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/concrete-resurfacing/): Decorative overlays, cool-deck-style pool deck resurfacing, crack and spalling repair, and sealing &mdash; restoring tired Gulf Coast concrete without the cost of a full tear-out.
- [Paver Driveways](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/paver-driveways/): Interlocking brick and concrete paver driveways &mdash; engineered base, sand-set field, and locked joints built to carry Florida vehicle loads without rutting, settling, or washing out.
- [Paver Patios &amp; Walkways](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/paver-patios-walkways/): Paver patios, walkways, pool decks, fire pits, and steps &mdash; from tight running-bond paths to wide gravel-joint patios, set on a compacted base and built to stay flat and cool underfoot.
- [Pool Deck Pavers &amp; Travertine](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/pool-deck-pavers/): Travertine, brick, and concrete pavers laid around your pool — cool underfoot in July, set on a compacted base that holds true through our sandy soil and summer storms.
- [Paver Sealing &amp; Restoration](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/paver-sealing/): Cleaning, re-sanding, re-leveling, and sealing tired pavers across Bradenton and Lakewood Ranch &mdash; bringing a faded, weed-grown driveway or pool deck back to the day it was laid.

## Service Areas

- [Lakewood Ranch, FL](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/lakewood-ranch/): Lakewood Ranch &mdash; 30,000-acre master-planned community across two counties with 30+ villages. New-construction driveways, lanai pool decks, and paver upgrades drive constant hardscape demand, all gated by HOA architectural review.
- [Bradenton, FL](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/bradenton/): Bradenton &mdash; Manatee County seat. 60,000 in the city, 420,000 in the metro. Gated golf communities east of I-75 want paver driveways and pool decks; mid-century homes west of US-41 drive poured-concrete and decorative flatwork.
- [Parrish, FL](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/parrish/): Parrish &mdash; the fastest-growing community in Manatee County, population doubled since 2015 to 28,000+. New-construction master-planned neighborhoods (North River Ranch, Aviary, Canoe Creek) drive paver driveway and pool-deck upgrades off builder-grade concrete.
- [Palmetto, FL](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/palmetto/): Palmetto &mdash; historic riverfront city across the Manatee River from Bradenton, 13,500 residents. 1950s&ndash;70s waterfront homes get poured driveways and paver walkways; Artisan Lakes and Trevesta along US-301 drive new-construction paver upgrades.
- [Ellenton, FL](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/ellenton/): Ellenton &mdash; small Manatee County community near the Ellenton Premium Outlets and Gamble Plantation. Covered Bridge, Bougainvillea Place, and nearby North River neighborhoods drive paver driveway and pool-deck upgrades plus poured-concrete patio work.
- [Sarasota, FL](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/sarasota/): Sarasota &mdash; Suncoast cultural anchor, 58,000 in the city and 450,000 in the metro. Keys waterfront homes drive premium paver pool decks; west-of-Trail ranches and Palmer Ranch homes drive driveway and decorative-concrete work.
- [Venice, FL](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/venice/): Venice &mdash; Sarasota County. 26,000 residents. Split market: Venice Island &amp; Historic Downtown driveway tear-outs and lanai pavers, plus Wellen Park / West Villages new-construction pool decks and stamped concrete (15,000+ homes since 2018).
- [North Port, FL](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/north-port/): North Port &mdash; Sarasota County. 85,000+ residents and climbing fast. Wellen Park / West Villages new-construction pool decks and paver lanais, plus heavy driveway repour work across the older Price Boulevard and Toledo Blade lot grid.
- [Port Charlotte, FL](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/port-charlotte/): Port Charlotte &mdash; Charlotte County. 60,000+ residents in a canal-home retiree market. Driveway and sidewalk repair across the 1970s&ndash;80s Section 15 and Murdock grid, plus salt-tolerant paver pool decks in Gulf Cove and South Gulf Cove.
- [Punta Gorda, FL](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/punta-gorda/): Punta Gorda &mdash; Charlotte County. 20,000+ residents. Premium paver pool decks in the Punta Gorda Isles and Burnt Store Isles canals, continuous new-construction at Babcock Ranch, and retiree repair work in Deep Creek and Seminole Lakes.
- [Riverview, FL](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/riverview/): Riverview &mdash; Hillsborough County. 100,000+ residents in a fast-growing suburb. New-build driveway extensions and paver pool decks across Triple Creek, Ventana, and South Fork, plus repair work in the older Panther Trace and Summerfield communities.
- [Sun City Center, FL](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/sun-city-center/): Sun City Center &mdash; Hillsborough County. 25,000+ residents in a major 55+ community. Driveway, sidewalk, and lanai repair plus paver overlays across the core and Kings Point, with some new-construction work in the Del Webb and Renaissance villages.
- [Tampa, FL](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/tampa/): Tampa &mdash; 400,000 in the city, 1.5M in Hillsborough County. South Tampa bungalows and luxury rebuilds drive paver driveways and pool decks; New Tampa and Tampa Palms gated communities drive builder-concrete upgrades under HOA review.
- [St. Petersburg, FL](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/st-petersburg/): St. Petersburg &mdash; Pinellas County, 260,000 in the city and 1M+ countywide. Historic bungalow neighborhoods drive paver driveways and decorative walkways; Snell Isle, Tierra Verde, and Shore Acres drive salt-tough canal-side pool decks.
- [Brandon, FL](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/brandon/): Brandon &mdash; established east Hillsborough suburb of 115,000+. 1980s&ndash;2000s subdivisions like Bloomingdale, Providence Lakes, and Heather Lakes drive paver driveway and pool-deck rebuilds plus decorative-concrete patio work, much of it under HOA review.
- [Ruskin, FL](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/ruskin/): Ruskin &mdash; fast-growing SouthShore community of 40,000+ on US-41 and I-75. New-construction subdivisions like Belmont, Cypress Creek, and Bahia Lakes drive paver driveway and pool-deck upgrades; Little Harbor and Shell Point add canal-side decks.
- [Wimauma, FL](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/wimauma/): Wimauma &mdash; rural land turned new-construction hub of 12,000+ in south Hillsborough. Valencia Lakes, Southshore Bay, Berry Bay, and DG Farms drive paver driveway and pool-deck upgrades off builder-grade concrete, all under HOA review.
- [Apollo Beach, FL](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/apollo-beach/): Apollo Beach &mdash; waterfront SouthShore community of 30,000+ built on Tampa Bay canals. MiraBay, Symphony Isles, and Andalucia drive premium canal-side paver pool decks; Waterset and Harbour Isles drive new-construction driveway and pool-deck upgrades.
- [Osprey, FL](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/osprey/): Osprey &mdash; affluent community between Sarasota and Venice on US-41. The Oaks and Southbay Yacht & Racquet Club drive luxury travertine and paver pool decks; Rivendell, Willowbend, and Park Trace homes upgrade driveways to pavers.
- [Nokomis, FL](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/nokomis/): Nokomis &mdash; coastal Sarasota County community north of Venice with heavy new construction. Bellacina, Toscana Isles, and Talon Preserve drive paver driveway and pool-deck upgrades; Calusa Lakes and Sorrento East get poured-concrete and decorative work.
- [Arcadia, FL](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/arcadia/): Arcadia &mdash; rural DeSoto County seat and ranch town with a historic downtown antique district. Long rural driveways, RV and equipment pads, and ag and barn slabs dominate, with poured-concrete and stamped patios downtown and pavers around Lake Suzy.
- [Anna Maria, FL](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/anna-maria/): Anna Maria &mdash; barrier-island town at the north end of Anna Maria Island, heavy on vacation rentals around Pine Avenue and Bean Point. Salt-air paver driveways, travertine pool decks, and elevated coastal slabs built for rental durability define the market.
- [Longboat Key, FL](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/longboat-key/): Longboat Key &mdash; luxury Gulf barrier island across two counties. Bay Isles, Country Club Shores, and the Longboat Key Club drive high-end travertine pool decks, marble-look surrounds, and sealed paver driveways built to survive salt spray.
- [Myakka City, FL](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/myakka-city/): Myakka City &mdash; rural equestrian and ranch country in east Manatee County. Long acreage driveways, RV pads, equipment and barn slabs, and horse-barn floors dominate, with paver driveways and pool decks on the larger custom-home lots in Panther Ridge and Myakka Valley Ranches.

## Guides

- [Pavers vs. Concrete Driveway in Florida: The Honest 2026 Breakdown](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/blog/pavers-vs-concrete-driveway-florida/): Pavers or poured concrete for a Florida driveway? Real cost, lifespan, repair, resale, and HOA factors compared for Lakewood Ranch and Manatee/Sarasota homes.
- [Why Florida Concrete Cracks — and How a Good Pour Prevents It](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/blog/why-florida-concrete-cracks-and-how-to-prevent-it/): Sandy soil, heat, and skipped joints crack Gulf Coast concrete. What actually causes driveway and slab cracks in Manatee County, and the prep that stops them.
- [The Coolest Pool Deck Surfaces for Florida Heat (2026 Guide)](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/blog/best-pool-deck-surface-florida-heat/): Travertine, pavers, or Kool-Deck resurfacing — which pool deck stays coolest underfoot in the Florida sun? Slip, heat, and cost compared for Suncoast homes.
- [Stamped Concrete Patio Ideas That Pass HOA Review in Lakewood Ranch](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/blog/stamped-concrete-patio-ideas-lakewood-ranch/): Stamped concrete patterns, colors, and finishes that look high-end and clear ARC approval in Lakewood Ranch and East Manatee master-planned communities.
- [Paver Sealing &amp; Re-Sanding in Florida: When, Why, and What It Costs](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/blog/paver-sealing-resanding-florida-guide/): How often to seal pavers in Florida, why joints wash out, and what polymeric re-sanding and sealing actually cost on the Suncoast. An installer&rsquo;s straight answer.

## Company Pages

- [About Lakewood Ranch Concrete](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/about/): Who we are, our crew, and our 42-Point Install Standard
- [FAQ](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/faq/): Real questions homeowners ask about concrete &amp; pavers, answered in writing
- [Warranty](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/warranty/): Written workmanship warranty on every pour and paver install
- [Financing](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/financing/): Payment options for driveways, patios, and pool decks
- [Contact](https://lakewoodranchconcretefl.com/contact/): Free estimate within 24 hours, often same-day
